cards.name: King of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: greed, materialistic, wasteful, chauvanist, poor financial decisions, gambler, exploitative, possessive

cards.name: 2 of Swords
cards.interpretation: stalemate, difficult choices, stuck in the middle, denial, hidden information

cards.name: 3 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: gossip, scandal, excess, isolation, loneliness, solitude, imbalanced social life
